title: विवाह प्राप्ति स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री विवाह प्राप्ति स्तोत्रम् ॥

पार्वतीं प्रणमाम्यादौ शिवपत्नीं सुमंगलाम्।
विवाहसिद्धिदां देवीं सौभाग्यप्रदायिनीम्॥१॥

कात्यायनी महामाये महायोगिन्यधीश्वरि।
नन्दगोपसुतां देवि पतिं मे कुरु ते नमः॥२॥

हे गौरि शंकरार्धाङ्गि त्वमेव विवाहदा।
सुयोग्यवरदात्री च सुमंगलविधायिनी॥३॥

रामचन्द्रो यथा सीतां विवाहे प्राप्तवान् प्रभुः।
तथा मम विवाहोऽपि शीघ्रं स्यात् पार्वतीकृपा॥४॥

शिवः पार्वतीं यथा प्राप्तः विष्णुर्लक्ष्मीं यथा हरिः।
तथा मम शुभं कार्यं विवाहं कुरु भामिनि॥५॥

मंगलं भगवान् विष्णुः मंगलं गरुडध्वजः।
मंगलं पुण्डरीकाक्षो मंगलायतनं हरिः॥६॥

स्वस्ति श्रीविवाहलक्ष्मीः सदा मे सन्निधिं कुरु।
त्वत्प्रसादेन देवेशि सुखी भवतु जीवनम्॥७॥

इदं विवाहस्तोत्रं यः पठेद्भक्तिसंयुतः।
मासत्रयेण विवाहः स्यात् न संशयः॥८॥

॥ इति श्री विवाह प्राप्ति स्तोत्रं सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Vivaha Prapti Stotram ||

Parvatim Pranamamy-adau Shiva-patnim Su-mangalam.
Vivaha-siddhi-dam Devim Saubhagya-pradayinim.||1||

Katyayani Maha-maye Maha-yoginy-adhishvari.
Nanda-gopa-sutam Devi Patim Me Kuru Te Namah.||2||

He Gauri Shankara-ardhangi Tvam Eva Vivaha-da.
Su-yogya-vara-datri Cha Su-mangala-vidhayini.||3||

Rama-chandro Yatha Sitam Vivahe Praptavan Prabhuh.
Tatha Mama Vivaho-api Shighram Syat Parvati-kripa.||4||

Shivah Parvatim Yatha Praptah Vishnur-lakshmim Yatha Harih.
Tatha Mama Shubham Karyam Vivaham Kuru Bhamini.||5||

Mangalam Bhagavan Vishnuh Mangalam Garuda-dhvajah.
Mangalam Pundarikaksho Mangala-ayatanam Harih.||6||

Svasti Shri-vivaha-lakshmih Sada Me Sannidhim Kuru.
Tvat-prasadena Deveshi Sukhi Bhavatu Jivanam.||7||

Idam Vivaha-stotram Yah Pathed-bhakti-samyutah.
Masa-trayena Vivahah Syat Na Samshayah.||8||

|| Iti Shri Vivaha Prapti Stotram Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning: सर्वप्रथम शिवपत्नी सुमंगला पार्वती को प्रणाम जो विवाहसिद्धि और सौभाग्य देने वाली हैं। हे कात्यायनी! मुझे पति प्रदान करो। हे गौरी! शंकर की अर्धांगिनी! तू ही विवाह देने वाली, सुयोग्य वर देने वाली है। जैसे राम को सीता मिलीं, शिव को पार्वती, विष्णु को लक्ष्मी, वैसे ही मेरा विवाह शीघ्र हो। यह स्तोत्र भक्ति से पढ़ने वाले का तीन मास में विवाह होता है, इसमें संशय नहीं।
benefits: Powerful prayer for early and auspicious marriage
Invokes Katyayani and Parvati for finding a suitable partner
References divine marriages of Rama-Sita and Shiva-Parvati
Removes mangal dosh and other marriage obstacles
Tradition says reciting for three months ensures marriage
Ideal for unmarried men and women seeking life partners
description: The Vivaha Prapti Stotram, known in Sanskrit as विवाह प्राप्ति स्तोत्रम्, is a devotional hymn of praise in praise of Goddess Parvati. Drawn from Devi Bhagavata Purana, this text has been cherished by devotees for centuries. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to invoke Katyayani and Parvati for finding a suitable partner as well as reference divine marriages of Rama-Sita and Shiva-Parvati. Additionally, it is known to tradition says reciting for three months ensures marriage. Recitation is particularly auspicious on Friday (Shukravar) and Monday (Somvar) and during Navratri and Vivah Panchami. Comprising 8 verses, it can be completed in approximately 4 minutes, making it suitable for daily devotional practice. On this page, you can read the complete Vivaha Prapti Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Vivaha Prapti Stotram in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Powerful prayer to Parvati and Katyayani for early marriage and finding a suitable partner.
